PLAINTIFF NOVA QUINN'S APPLICATION FOR ADMISSION OF ROBERT C. AUTIERI TO THE BAR OF THIS COURT PRO HAC VICE.

APPEARANCES: Yuliya Magomedov, Esq. of Law Offices of Sanford M. Cipinko 693-9905 for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted the application of Robert C. Autieri as plaintiff provided proof of payment to the State Bar. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
